infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MusB Diagnostics needs camera access so you can take photos of documents like prescriptions and insurance cards.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MusB Diagnostics needs photo library access so you can upload documents like prescriptions and insurance cards.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MusB Diagnostics needs permission to save photos you take of your documents.
